# MANUAL CAPTURE — `flutter doctor` requires the local Flutter SDK + system
# install state; not portable enough for the fixture generator.
# Source: developer host (macos 15.6.1 darwin-arm64)
# Flutter: 3.41.9 (stable, 2026-04-29)
# Dart: 3.11.5 (stable, 2026-04-15)
# Captured: 2026-05-17
# Command: flutter doctor
# Note: the partial Android-toolchain row is a recurring "licenses not
# accepted" prompt — easy to reproduce by skipping `flutter doctor --android-licenses`.
# To regenerate:
#   flutter doctor > <fixture>.txt 2>&1
#
Doctor summary (to see all details, run flutter doctor -v):
